zh.lifeSummary: 當Marion Scott於大約1454年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可時，她的父親Sir William Scott 7th of Balwearie30歲，母親Lady Isabel Moncrieffe21歲。她於大約1481年與Adam Johnstone Of Johnstone在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1510年11月3日在蘇格蘭度福利爾約翰斯通 白 藍霍爾姆享年57歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭度福利爾約翰斯通。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marion Scott于大约1454年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可时，她的父亲Sir William Scott 7th of Balwearie30岁，母亲Lady Isabel Moncrieffe21岁。她于大约1481年与Adam Johnstone Of Johnstone在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1510年11月3日在苏格兰度福利爾約翰斯通 白 藍霍爾姆享年57岁，埋葬在苏格兰度福利爾約翰斯通。

nameMeanings.name: Scott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (Down): habitational and ethnic name from Middle English Scot ‘man from Scotland’. There is no evidence that the surname denoted either of the earlier senses of Scot as ‘(Gaelic-speaking) Irishman’ or ‘man from Alba’, the Gaelic-speaking region of Scotland north of the river Forth. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English and Scottish: from the rare Middle English personal name Scot (Old English Scott, possibly also Old Norse Skotr), only certainly attested in northern England.

variants.name: Scutt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Pierre.
English: nickname for a short person, from Middle English scut(e) ‘short’, or else for a swift runner, from Middle English scut ‘hare’.

nameMeanings.name: Marion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Marion Scott was born about 1454, in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, her father, Sir William Scott 7th of Balwearie, was 30 and her mother, Lady Isabel Moncrieffe, was 21. She married Adam Johnstone Of Johnstone about 1481, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 3 November 1510, in Johnstone by Langholm, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, at the age of 57, and was buried in Johnstone, Dumfriesshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marion Scott est née environ 1454, à Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Sir William Scott 7th of Balwearie, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lady Isabel Moncrieffe, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Adam Johnstone Of Johnstone environ 1481, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 3 novembre 1510, à Johnstone by Langholm, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Johnstone, Dumfriesshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marion Scott um 1454 in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Scott 7th of Balwearie 30 und ihre Mutter Lady Isabel Moncrieffe 21. Sie hat um 1481 in Scotland Adam Johnstone Of Johnstone geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 3. November 1510 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Johnstone by Langholm, Dumfriesshire, Scotland und wurde in Johnstone, Dumfriesshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marion Scott è nata il circa 1454 nel Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir William Scott 7th of Balwearie, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Lady Isabel Moncrieffe, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Adam Johnstone Of Johnstone circa 1481, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 3 novembre 1510, nel Johnstone by Langholm, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolta a Johnstone, Dumfriesshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Marion Scottが約1454年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマルノックで生まれた時，父Sir William Scott 7th of Balwearieは30歳，母Lady Isabel Moncrieffeは21歳であった。約1481年にスコットランドでAdam Johnstone Of Johnstoneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1510年11月3日にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアジョンストーン ビー ラングhオルムで57歳で死去し，スコットランドダムフリーシュアイアジョンストーンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marion Scott(이)가 대략 1454년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬마노c크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Scott 7th of Balwearie(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Isabel Moncrieffe(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1481년 스컷랜드에서 Adam Johnstone Of Johnstone(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1510년 11월 3일 스컷랜드 드프리실르 존스톤 비 랭홀름에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 드프리실르 존스톤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marion Scott nasceu aproximadamente 1454, em Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir William Scott 7th of Balwearie, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Lady Isabel Moncrieffe, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Adam Johnstone Of Johnstone aproximadamente 1481, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 3 de novembro de 1510, em Johnstone by Langholm, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, com 57 anos, e foi sepultada em Johnstone, Dumfriesshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marion Scott родилась около 1454 г. в местности килмарнокк, аиршир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir William Scott 7th of Balwearie было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Isabel Moncrieffe, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Adam Johnstone Of Johnstone около 1481 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 3 ноября 1510 г. в местности джонстоун би лангхолм, думфриессхир, Шотландия в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности джонстоун, думфриессхир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marion Scott nació aproximadamente 1454, en Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir William Scott 7th of Balwearie, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Lady Isabel Moncrieffe, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Adam Johnstone Of Johnstone aproximadamente 1481, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 3 de noviembre de 1510, en Johnstone by Langholm, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultada en Johnstone, Dumfriesshire, Scotland.
